query: 跨境电商促销海报，目的是宣传，要求：1.有艺术字，2.有字体堆叠，3.画面较为复杂但不能杂乱，4.有产品或者主体挡住一些字体，4.画面比例16:9

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign, designed at 16:9 landscape ratio.

Style/medium: bold graphic design poster, layered typographic composition, commercial advertising illustration with editorial complexity — inspired by high-energy retail campaign visuals
Composition: 16:9 wide landscape layout, multi-layer depth with foreground product hero blocking partial background type, dynamic diagonal tension between text layers and product
Subject: hero product (e-commerce merchandise, e.g. packaged goods or electronics) placed prominently in foreground, partially overlapping and obscuring stacked background lettering; decorative artistic lettering integrated as visual element
Scene/backdrop: rich layered background built from stacked typographic blocks — large display type, medium subheading type, and fine-print type in multiple scales creating depth; background is dense but spatially organized
Lighting/mood: bright, high-energy promotional atmosphere; punchy contrast between product and type layers; festive commercial energy without clutter
Color palette: bold primary accent color (e.g. vivid red or electric yellow) as hero tone, contrasted against deep navy or black background type mass, with white highlights for legibility hierarchy
Materials/textures: glossy product surface catching specular highlight, matte typographic layers receding into background, subtle paper or grain texture unifying the composition
Text (verbatim): decorative artistic lettering and stacked multi-scale type blocks as core visual structure — large display words in background, medium promotional copy in midground, product name or tagline as artistic wordmark
Constraints: type stacking must create clear foreground / midground / background depth; product or main subject must visibly overlap and cut in front of at least one text layer; composition must feel complex and layered but spatially ordered — no chaotic overlap; all type layers must remain partially legible as graphic texture even where occluded
Avoid: sparse or minimal layouts; single-layer flat design; illegible muddy color collisions; random scattered elements with no visual hierarchy; generic stock-photo collage look; stuffer aesthetic

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为跨境电商促销活动生成一张宣传海报，画面比例 16:9，风格复杂而有序。

风格/介质:数字平面设计海报，融合现代电商视觉语言，排版层次丰富，整体有设计感但不凌乱
构图:16:9 横版构图，中心偏左放置主体产品，文字层叠分布于画面各区域，产品实物遮挡部分字体形成前后层次感，视觉焦点清晰
主体:跨境电商促销主体产品（如包装盒、购物袋或电子产品），造型立体，置于画面前景，遮挡背后堆叠的字体元素
场景/背景:抽象几何色块或渐变背景，带有全球化/国际感的视觉符号（如地球线条、航运图案），背景层叠多个大字号装饰性文字
光线/氛围:明亮硬光，高对比，节日促销氛围，充满活力与紧迫感
色彩搭配:主色调以高饱和撞色为主（如红+金、橙+深蓝），促销感强烈，文字与背景之间有足够对比度保证可读性
材质/纹理:光滑数字渲染质感，局部可有金属光泽或镭射渐变点缀
文字(原文保留):"SALE" "GLOBAL SHOPPING" "LIMITED OFFER" 等艺术字以大字号堆叠排布，部分字体被产品主体遮挡，形成层次感
约束:画面复杂但层次分明，不能杂乱；字体堆叠需有大小、粗细、透明度的变化；产品主体必须遮挡至少一处字体；艺术字需有变形、描边或立体效果处理
避免:平铺直叙的单层排版、廉价电商模板感、字体与背景撞色导致不可读、元素随机堆砌无视觉逻辑

Use case: product-mockup / promotional poster
Asset type: cross-border e-commerce promotional banner, 16:9 landscape
Primary request: a visually rich promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce with artistic lettering, layered typographic stacking, and a hero product partially overlapping the text
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient background with subtle geometric or light-burst elements suggesting global commerce — dynamic but not chaotic
Subject: one or two hero e-commerce products (e.g., packaged goods or electronics) placed in the foreground, physically overlapping and partially obscuring the stacked text layers behind them
Style/medium: modern graphic design illustration, commercial poster art, bold editorial layout
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide landscape, multi-layer depth — background text layer → midground decorative type → foreground product blocking some letters, creating a sense of spatial depth
Lighting/mood: vibrant, energetic, festive promotional mood; soft directional light on the product to give it dimension
Color palette: bold and saturated — deep navy or rich red as base, gold/yellow accent highlights, white text contrast
Materials/textures: glossy product surface, slight paper or foil texture on typographic elements
Text (verbatim): 艺术字体堆叠排版，部分文字被产品遮挡，营造层次感
Constraints: text must be stacked in multiple layers with varied font sizes and weights; at least one product must visually overlap and cut in front of some letterforms; overall layout must feel structured and intentional, not cluttered
Avoid: plain flat layout with no depth, random scattered elements with no visual hierarchy, illegible text due to poor contrast, watermark
